name: Lando Norris
description:
💿 | you and your best friend get high for 4/20 (TW: drug use)                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
I’m being so serious when I say I literally had this EXACT idea but I didn’t know if you guys would like it so I didn’t make it and then a day later someone requested this from me and I knew it was meant to be. Shout out to whoever requested this one, you read my mind <3

🕊️ this has the dead dove tag due to drug use and possible abuse of drugs 

Character works with any gender pov and both user & character are over the age of 18 :)
